cpu: AMD Ryzen 3 2200G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Game starts and runs just fine, but there is no audio at all. You can't really play it without audio as I believe you receive all your instructions over the radio. I don't think it's a problem with wine, a lot of people on windows claim to have this issue and the game hasn't been patched in a long time.
title: Interkosmos
